title: symphoricarpos albus
intro: Symphoricarpos albus, also known as the snowy or silver buffalo berry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Symphoricarpos albus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
